name: Dream — Nightly Dry Run
description: Checks for new transcripts and runs a dry-run dream evaluation if enough have accumulated.

prompts.content:
Check pending dream session count and run a dry-run evaluation if enough have accumulated.

Steps:
1. cd to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/dreaming
2. Run `node cli/dream.mjs status --json` and read the `pending` count.
3. If pending < 5, respond with "Skipped: only <N> pending sessions (threshold: 5)" and stop.
4. If pending >= 5, apply the dreaming skill in dry-run mode:
   a. Run `node cli/dream.mjs scope --json` to list in-scope sessions.
   b. Launch dream-evaluator (readonly) over the pending transcripts with the active soul.
   c. Write the report to ~/.cursor/dreaming/dreams/<timestamp>.md.
   d. Do NOT apply anything, do NOT update the index (dry-run stops after the report).
5. Post the report highlights to chat: proposed AGENTS.md diff, skill/subagent/rule candidates, stale sessions, and the Dreamer's Notes section.

Do NOT apply any memory or mutate ~/.cursor/AGENTS.md or the dream index. Dry-run only.
